locatorcolors.option.colorize_chat.toolt: Applies the player's locator color to their name in the chat window.
locatorcolors.option.colorize_tab_list.t: Applies the player's locator color to their name in the player list.
Applies the player's locator color to the nameplate rendered above their character's head.
Renders the player's 2D skin face inside their colored locator dot when the player list is open.
locatorcolors.option.colorize_self.toolt: If disabled, your own name will remain its default color across the chat, tab list, and name tags.
